case_title: ELINO F. LAYANTE VS. JUAN CARLOS RAMOS et al

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED UNSERVED AS TO DEFENDANT JUMP FOR FUN, INC.
CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO JUMP FOR FUN, INC. BY COURT AT SMALL CLAIM HEARING OF JUL-18-2008 AT 8:30AM.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-18-2008 - JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF PRESENT. DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. COMMISSIONER PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LAYANTE, ELINO F. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RAMOS, JUAN CARLOS $2,230.83 PRINCIPAL, $60.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,290.83, DEFENDANT JUMP FOR FUN, INC. DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE - NO SERVICE. DEFENDANT JUAN CARLOS RAMOS NOT PRESENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
COPYING FEES PAID BY PLAINTIFF LAYANTE, ELINO F.
